title: Responding to You
subtitle: Senses become more active
description: By week 25, your baby’s senses continue to develop, and responsiveness to sound and touch becomes more noticeable. Movements are stronger, and you may feel clear patterns of activity.
what_to_expect: Fetal movements are strong and more predictable
Baby may respond to sounds and voices
You may notice regular patterns of activity and rest
care_tips: Maintain a balanced and nutrient-rich diet
Stay hydrated and follow a consistent routine
Engage in light exercise and maintain proper posture

medical_checkups.note: Monitoring continues with focus on growth and responsiveness.

commonly_suggested.name: Routine Prenatal Checkup
commonly_suggested.purpose: Tracks maternal health and fetal development

commonly_suggested.name: Glucose Tolerance Test (if not done earlier)

medical_checkups.guidance: Your doctor may complete or review glucose testing results during this period.

important_note: Your baby’s increasing responsiveness is a positive sign of sensory development.
reassurance: You may start feeling a stronger connection as your baby responds to your voice and movements.
medical_disclaimer: Consult your healthcare provider if you notice any unusual changes in movement patterns.

diabetes.personalized_description: Maintaining stable blood sugar levels supports continued growth and responsiveness.
diabetes.medical_focus: Blood sugar levels may be reviewed along with glucose test results.

anemia.personalized_description: Adequate iron supports oxygen supply during increased activity and development.
care_tips: Pair with vitamin C for better absorption
anemia.medical_focus: Hemoglobin levels may be monitored during routine tests.
anemia.reassurance: Supporting your nutrition helps maintain your energy.

hypertension.personalized_description: Stable blood pressure supports proper circulation during this active stage.
hypertension.medical_focus: Blood pressure monitoring remains important during checkups.
hypertension.reassurance: A calm and steady routine supports your well-being.

thyroid.personalized_description: Balanced thyroid levels support continued growth and metabolic balance.
thyroid.medical_focus: Thyroid function may be monitored during ongoing evaluations.
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency helps maintain a healthy balance.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: As responsiveness increases, managing multiple conditions requires steady and mindful care.
priority_tips: Avoid sudden dietary or lifestyle changes
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Small, consistent efforts support healthy development.
